title: trichosma nutans
intro: Trichosma nutans is a plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae, commonly known as the hairy borage or hairy forget-me-not. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Trichosma nutans include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate skin conditions like eczema and acne. Trichosma nutans can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and health.
